content.speakerText: I'm trying to download a paper from ScienceDirect, but it says I don't have access. What should I do?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正试图从ScienceDirect下载一篇论文，但显示我没有访问权限，该怎么办？
expectedAnswers: Make sure you're logged in through the university library portal.
You probably need to use the proxy link—check the library’s remote access page.
If you're off campus, connect to the university VPN first, then try again.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确识别访问限制的原因（未通过图书馆认证）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'proxy link', 'university portal', 'VPN'
回答是否结构清晰、逻辑完整，有实际操作步骤
